mapper.select: /* 시스템 프롬프트 목록 조회 prompt.selectSystemPromptList */ SELECT A.PROMPT_ID , A.PROMPT_TYPE_CD , A.PROMPT_NAME , A.CONTENT , A.APPLY_LLM_YN , A.USE_YN , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_PROMPT A WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY A.PROMPT_ID
/* 에이전트 목록 조회 prompt.selectAgentList */ SELECT A.AGENT_ID , A.AGENT_NM FROM TB_AGT A WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.SORT_ORD
/* 프롬프트 적용 에이전트 목록 조회 prompt.selectPromptAppAgtList */ SELECT A.PROMPT_ID , A.AGENT_ID , A.APPLY_YN FROM TB_PROMPT_APPLY_AGT A WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY A.PROMPT_ID

/* 콘텐츠 필터 정책 목록 조회 prompt.selectPolicyList */ SELECT B.FILTER_CD , A.CODE_NM AS FILTER_NAME , A.DESCRIPTION AS FILTER_DESC , B.APPLY_YN , B.SORT_ORD , B.USE_YN , B.CREATE_DT , B.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_CODE A LEFT JOIN TB_CONTENT_FLTR B ON A.CODE_ID = B.FILTER_CD WHERE 1=1 AND A.CODE_GRP_ID = 'CF000001' ORDER BY B.SORT_ORD

/* 금지어 목록 조회 prompt.selectBanWordList */ SELECT A.WORD_ID , A.WORD , A.WORD_TYPE , A.USE_YN , A.CREATE_DT FROM TB_BAN_WORD A WHERE 1=1 AND A.WORD_TYPE = #{wordType} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.WORD_ID
mapper.delete: /* 금지어 전체 삭제 prompt.deleteAllBanWord */ DELETE FROM TB_BAN_WORD
mapper.select: /* 토큰 제한 설정 조회 prompt.selectTokenLmt */ SELECT A.LIMIT_ID , A.MAX_IN_TOKENS , A.MAX_OUT_TOKENS , A.CTXT_WIN , A.DAY_USER_LMT , A.MON_ORG_LMT , A.RATE_LMT_RPM , A.MIN_RESP_LEN , A.RESP_TMO , A.RETRY_CNT , A.STREAM_YN , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_TOKEN_LMT A WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY A.MODIFY_DT DESC LIMIT 1
